name: PER_SHARE_INFORMATION
description: This table records the items of personal, employment etc., information are to be shared for a given instance.

columns.Name: SHARE_INSTANCE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key column

columns.Name: EXPIRATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Expiration date for sharing information

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: System Identifier for the Person whose information is being shared

columns.Name: ACCESS_KEY
columns.Comments: Key used for login in and seeing the shared data when information is shared Externally.

columns.Name: VERIFICATION_KEY
columns.Comments: Key used in the URL for checking and locating an appropriate record of Share Information

columns.Name: VISITS_REMAINING
columns.Comments: Counter that starts equal to NUMBER_OF_VISITS and get decreasing by 1 till 0 each time the page is accessed by Recipient

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Assignment Identifier for the Person whose information is being shared

columns.Name: GRANTEE_EMAIL
columns.Comments: Records the email address to which the external Share of Information will be sent.

columns.Name: REPLY_TO_EMAIL
columns.Comments: Records the email address of the person who shared the information in case of external sharing.

columns.Name: GRANTEE_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the External person with whom the information is shared.

columns.Name: GRANTEE_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Records the Person Id that was granted system access in internal sharing of information.

columns.Name: ACCESS_GRANTED_BY
columns.Comments: System identifier to the person who granted the access.

columns.Name: NUMBER_OF_DAYS
columns.Comments: It stores the period of share information in the external sharing.

columns.Name: NUMBER_OF_VISITS
columns.Comments: It stores the max. no. of visits for external person.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Comments provided during the share information.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.
